Tested the free trial for image to video generation - super impressed! It turns stills into clips with smooth, seamless scene transitions. Worth a try if you want quick, polished motion without heavy editing. Might consider getting the paid version since the output is better than others I've tested.

• [...] Codex by OpenAI

Codex by OpenAIAI that writes code for you

5.0 (21 reviews)

AI Coding Agents

We use Codex for PR reviews. Easy to hook up to our repo. Codex leaves a 👀 on the PR description when the review starts and a 👍 when the review finishes. That's a delightful experience. More importantly, it has caught a few critical issues. We don't use Codex for code generation, so it's nice to have an agent that did not write the code review it.

ZedThe Fastest AI Code Editor
